---
title: "Subclusters Fibroblasts"
author: "Sophie.Alice"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

# Setup

```{r, message=FALSE, warning = FALSE}
rm(list=ls())
gc()

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Seurat)
library(hdf5r)
library(scCustomize)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(ggrepel)
library(workflowr)
library(scDblFinder)
library(clustree)
library(harmony)
library(speckle)
library(MAST)
library(tibble)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

library(ggarchery)
library(ggtangle)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(GO.db)
library(DOSE)
library(fgsea)
library(forcats)
library(SCpubr)
library(assertthat)
library(UCell)
library(DT)

library(ggforce) 
library(enrichplot)
library(ggrain)
```


# Get the Data

```{r, warning = FALSE}
path <- "/Users/sophiewagner/Desktop/USZ 25:26/Gabi_Project_Setup/Laila_MT_Project/Laila_MT_Project/RDS_Files/Post_Annotation.rds"
Data <- read_rds(path)
Data
Fibroblasts.raw <- subset(Data, cell_type == "Cardiac Fibroblasts")
Idents(Data) <- "orig.ident" 

custom_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#005EA8", "#6DB335", "#FFD966", "#EDAAD2", "#9F1C67"))
gradient_colors3 <- custom_palette(6)
gradient_colors4 <- custom_palette(4)
```


MArker genes for subclusters

take

APOD and APOE CCL2 TGFB COL always 

CFD

COL1A1, COL3A1, 


Take out from Gabi:

CCL19, PROM1, APOO, MK167, TOP2A, BIRC5, CENPF, 

# Functions

```{r, warning = FALSE}


##################################### Tables

create_table <- function(df) {
  DT::datatable(
    df,
    extensions = 'Buttons', 
    options = list(
      dom = 'Blfrtip',                       
      buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf'),
      pageLength = 10,                      
      lengthMenu = c(10, 25, 50, 100)     
    ),
    filter = 'top',                         
    class = 'cell-border stripe hover'       
  )
}

```

## Inspecting Data

```{r, warning = FALSE}

Data 
DefaultAssay(Data)

table(Data$orig.ident)
table(Data$TGF_status)
table(Data$Macrophage_status)

```

## Isolating and Sub-clustering Cardiac Fibroblasts

PC = 20 

```{r, warning = FALSE}

set.seed(42)
# 2. Split by sample to prepare for fresh subset normalization
Fibroblasts.list <- SplitObject(Fibroblasts.raw, split.by = "orig.ident")

# 3. Re-run SCTransform on the fibroblast subsets to find fibroblast-specific variance
for (i in 1:length(Fibroblasts.list)) {
  DefaultAssay(Fibroblasts.list[[i]]) <- "RNA"
  Fibroblasts.list[[i]] <- SCTransform(Fibroblasts.list[[i]], 
                                       vst.flavor = "v2", 
                                       vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", 
                                       return.only.var.genes = TRUE,
                                       method = "glmGamPoi",
                                       verbose = FALSE)
}


fib_features <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = Fibroblasts.list, nfeatures = 3000)
Fibroblasts <- merge(x = Fibroblasts.list[[1]], y = Fibroblasts.list[2:length(Fibroblasts.list)], merge.data = TRUE)
VariableFeatures(Fibroblasts) <- fib_features

Fibroblasts <- RunPCA(Fibroblasts, npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)


##################################### Elbowplot

ElbowPlot(Fibroblasts, ndims = 50)+
  labs(
    title = "Principal Component (PC) Variance Elbow Plot"
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 20, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred", size = 0.8)+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

##################################### Clustering without integrations


Dims <- 20
Fibroblasts <- RunUMAP(Fibroblasts, dims = 1:Dims)
Fibroblasts <- FindNeighbors(Fibroblasts, dims = 1:Dims)
Graphs(Fibroblasts)
Fibroblasts <- FindClusters(Fibroblasts, graph.name = "SCT_snn", resolution = seq(0.1, 0.8, by=0.1))

clustree::clustree(Fibroblasts@meta.data[,grep("SCT_snn_res", colnames(Fibroblasts@meta.data))],
                   prefix = "SCT_snn_res.")+
  labs(
    title = "Clustree - Before integration"
  ) +
  xlab("Cluster") +
  ylab("Resolution depth") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)


DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.1")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.2")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.3")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.4")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.5")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "orig.ident")

##################################### integration

# 6. Run Harmony to integrate fibroblasts across your conditions/samples
Fibroblasts <- RunHarmony(Fibroblasts, 
                          group.by.vars = "orig.ident", 
                          dims.use = 1:Dims,
                          plot_convergence = TRUE,
                          .options = harmony_options(max.iter.cluster = 100))


##################################### Clustering with integration

# 7. UMAP and Clustering using the Harmony reduction
DefaultAssay(Fibroblasts) <- "SCT"
Fibroblasts <- RunUMAP(Fibroblasts, dims = 1:Dims, reduction = "harmony")
Fibroblasts <- FindNeighbors(Fibroblasts, dims = 1:Dims, reduction = "harmony")

# Using a slightly lower resolution range since sub-clustering is more sensitive
Fibroblasts <- FindClusters(Fibroblasts, graph.name = "SCT_snn", resolution = seq(0.1, 0.8, by=0.1))


clustree::clustree(Fibroblasts@meta.data[,grep("SCT_snn_res", colnames(Fibroblasts@meta.data))],
                   prefix = "SCT_snn_res.")+
  labs(
    title = "Clustree - After integration"
  ) +
  xlab("Cluster") +
  ylab("Resolution depth") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)



DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.1")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.2")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.3")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.4")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.5")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "orig.ident")

```







```{r, warning = FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=7}


DefaultAssay(Fibroblasts) <- "RNA"
Idents(Fibroblasts) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.5"
Markers <- FindAllMarkers(Fibroblasts, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.5, logfc.threshold = 0.5)
Markers_top10 <- as.data.frame(Markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 10, wt = avg_log2FC))
Markers_top3 <- as.data.frame(Markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC))
Markers_top5 <- as.data.frame(Markers %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 5, wt = avg_log2FC))

create_table(Markers_top10)


```

## Heatmap vis

```{r, warning = FALSE}


heatmap_cols <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9,"RdBu"))(256)
heatmap_cols <- rev(heatmap_cols[1:256])
Heatmap <- DoHeatmap(Fibroblasts, cells = colnames(Fibroblasts), label = FALSE, draw.line = F, features = Markers_top10$gene, assay = "SCT") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = heatmap_cols) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5)) +
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0, 0, 0), 
                           "inches"))
Heatmap

```

## VLN vis

```{r, warning = FALSE}
table(Fibroblasts$SCT_snn_res.0.5)

VlnPlot(Fibroblasts, features = c("nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA", "percent.mt", "percent.rp", "scDblFinder.score"), ncol = 3, pt.size = 0) + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())


FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts, features = "TTN", pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) # Cardiomyocyte marker
## --> assumption = Cluster 3 is Cardiomyocyte and Fibroblast doublets?

VlnPlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts, features = dplyr::filter(Markers_top10, cluster == "6")$gene, num_columns = 5, pt.size = 0) + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())
## --> assumption = Cluster 6 is MT-Cells
```

# Feature Plots

```{r, warning = FALSE}


FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts, features = "CD163", pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) # Macrophage marker


FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts, features = "FAP", pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) # Activated Fibroblast Marker

FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts, features = "TTN", pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) # Cardiomyocyte marker
## --> assumption = Cluster 3 is Cardiomyocyte and Fibroblast doublets?

DimPlot(Fibroblasts, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T,
        group.by = "Phase")


```


```{r, warning = FALSE}


# Remove only the clearly mitochondrial cluster and the left over doubles
Fibroblasts.clean <- subset(Fibroblasts, subset = SCT_snn_res.0.5 %in% c("0", "1", "2", "4", "5","7"))


DefaultAssay(Fibroblasts.clean) <- "SCT"
Fibroblasts.clean <- SplitObject(Fibroblasts.clean, split.by = "orig.ident")
features <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = Fibroblasts.clean, nfeatures = 3000)
Fibroblasts.clean <- merge(x = Fibroblasts.clean[[1]], y = Fibroblasts.clean[2:length(Fibroblasts.clean)], merge.data=TRUE)
VariableFeatures(Fibroblasts.clean) <- features
Fibroblasts.clean <- RunPCA(Fibroblasts.clean, npcs = 50)

Fibroblasts.clean <- RunHarmony(Fibroblasts.clean, 
                 group.by.vars = c("orig.ident"), 
                 dims.use = 1:Dims, 
                 plot_convergence=TRUE, 
                 .options = harmony_options(
                   max.iter.cluster = 100,
                   )
                 )

DefaultAssay(Fibroblasts.clean) <- "SCT"
Fibroblasts.clean <- RunUMAP(Fibroblasts.clean, dims = 1:Dims, reduction = "harmony")
Fibroblasts.clean <- FindNeighbors(Fibroblasts.clean, dims = 1:Dims, reduction = "harmony")
Fibroblasts.clean <- FindClusters(Fibroblasts.clean, resolution = seq(0.1, 0.8, by=0.1))

clustree::clustree(Fibroblasts.clean@meta.data[,grep("SCT_snn_res", colnames(Fibroblasts.clean@meta.data))],
                   prefix = "SCT_snn_res.")

DimPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.1")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.2")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.3")

DimPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "orig.ident")
DimPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, reduction = "umap", shuffle = T, group.by = "Phase")


DefaultAssay(Fibroblasts.clean) <- "RNA"
Idents(Fibroblasts.clean) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.3"
Markers.2 <- FindAllMarkers(Fibroblasts.clean, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.5, logfc.threshold = 0.5)
Markers_top10.2 <- as.data.frame(Markers.2 %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 10, wt = avg_log2FC))
Markers_top3.2 <- as.data.frame(Markers.2 %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC))

Markers_top5.2 <- as.data.frame(Markers.2 %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n = 5, wt = avg_log2FC))


SCpubr::do_DotPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, 
                   features = Markers_top10.2$gene,
                   dot.scale = 10,
                   plot.title = "Top 10 markers per cluster") 


create_table(Markers_top10.2)

VlnPlot(Fibroblasts.clean, 
        features = c("nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA", "percent.mt"), 
        group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.3", 
        pt.size = 0.1)



```


```{r, warning = FALSE}
gradient_colors <- custom_palette(4)

cellCounts1 <- as.data.frame(table(Celltype = Fibroblasts.clean$SCT_snn_res.0.2, sample = Fibroblasts.clean$orig.ident))

ggplot(data = cellCounts1, aes(x = sample, fill = Celltype, y = Freq)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_bw() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = gradient_colors) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(title = "Proportions across Identities", x = "", y = "fraction of cells")


############ Fibro sub

quiescent <- c( "DCN", "GSN", "PDGFRA")
FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts.clean, features = quiescent, pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

inflammatory <- c("IL6", "CCL2", "CXCL1", "CXCL12")
FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts.clean, features = inflammatory, pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

active <- c("ACTA2", "POSTN", "COL1A1", "FN1")
FeaturePlot_scCustom(Fibroblasts.clean, features = active, pt.size = 0, reduction = "umap") + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

table(Fibroblasts.clean$orig.ident)  # --> Proportions too different to sinvoll subsets machen. 


```
